title: DSK Legal, Touchstone Partners act on NewEra Hospitals securing funds from Premji Invest
description: NewEra Group of Hospitals has secured an investment from Premji Invest.DSK Legal advised NewEra Hospitals and its founders on this transaction.The transaction team was led by Mayank Mehta (Partner), and included Aishwarya Kapoor (Principal Associate) and Aasil Singh (Associate).Mayank MehtaTouchstone Partners advised Premji Invest on this investment deal.The transaction team was led by Anirudh Agarwala (Partner) and included Pranjal Doshi (Counsel), Kajal Advani (Senior Associate), Associates Am
